# ADS-B Radar Aircraft Icons

This folder contains the subset of the ADS-B Radar free aircraft SVG icon set used to generate the OLED bitmaps in `arduino-radar/aircraft_bitmaps.h`.

Source: https://adsb-radar.com/help/icons.html

Attribution requested by the icon author:

Icons by ADS-B Radar for macOS - https://adsb-radar.com/ - https://apps.apple.com/app/id1538149835
